key_facts: NVIDIA Blackwell GB200 sold out through H1 2026 — backlog estimated at 3.6 million units
GB300 (Blackwell Ultra) NVL72 platform ramp-up commenced at TSMC
Full mass production of GB200 entered at start of 2026; transitioning to GB300
TSMC supply chain ecosystem fully engaged across GB300 component tiers
Demand driven by hyperscaler AI training and inference workload expansion
